brand.name: INVYTRA
loadingQuotes: Creating First Impressions That Last Forever.
Every Celebration Deserves a Grand Entrance.

about.heading: Redefining the Art of Invitation.
about.description1: We do not just design invitations; we craft immersive digital experiences. Each INVYTRA creation is a bespoke website that sets the perfect tone for your most cherished moments.
about.description2: From elegant typography to cinematic animations, every detail is meticulously refined to ensure your guests are captivated before the celebration even begins.

hero.headline: Luxury Digital Invitations That Leave a Lasting Impression
hero.subheading: Create unforgettable digital invitations for weddings, birthdays, engagements, baby showers, corporate events, and every special occasion.

process.title: Choose Template
process.desc: Browse our curated collection and select a luxury base design that resonates with your vision.

process.title: Contact via WhatsApp
process.desc: Reach out directly on WhatsApp, no forms, no delays, just instant human connection.

process.title: Share Event Details
process.desc: Provide your event information, colors, photos, and any special customization requests.

process.title: We Design
process.desc: Our designers craft your bespoke website with cinematic animations and luxury typography.

process.title: Review and Revisions
process.desc: Preview your invitation and request unlimited refinements until it is absolutely perfect.

process.title: Final Delivery
process.desc: Receive your live invitation link, fully hosted, responsive, and ready to share.

process.title: Share with Guests
process.desc: Send your elegant link via WhatsApp, Instagram, or email. Watch the reactions pour in.

templates.name: Emerald Reverie

templates.name: The Red Affair
templates.description: A bold and striking minimal design that commands attention. Perfect for corporate events and modern celebrations.

testimonials.name: Sarah and James
testimonials.text: INVYTRA absolutely transformed how we invited our guests. Everyone asked who designed our website. It was stunning.

testimonials.name: Elena M.
testimonials.text: The animations were incredibly smooth. It felt like scrolling through an expensive brand website. Worth every penny.

testimonials.name: Marcus T.
testimonials.text: Professional, seamless, and visually breathtaking. INVYTRA delivered exactly what our corporate brand needed.

faq.question: How long does it take to receive my invitation website?
faq.answer: Most templates are delivered within 3-5 business days after we receive your event details. Rush delivery in 24-48 hours is available on request.

faq.question: How do I place an order?
faq.answer: Simply browse our template collection, click Order on WhatsApp on your chosen design, and our team will guide you through the entire personalization process. No complicated forms, just a conversation.

faq.question: Can I customize colors, fonts, and content?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Every element is fully customizable including colors, typography, photos, event details, music, animations, and more. Your invitation will be uniquely yours.

faq.question: How many revisions are included?
faq.answer: We offer unlimited revisions until you are completely satisfied. Your happiness is our priority and we will not stop refining until every detail is exactly as you envisioned.

faq.question: Where will my invitation website be hosted?
faq.answer: Your invitation is hosted on a secure, fast server with a unique link you can share anywhere via WhatsApp, Instagram, email, or printed as a QR code on physical cards.

faq.question: Is the invitation mobile-friendly?
faq.answer: Every INVYTRA design is fully responsive and tested across all devices including smartphones, tablets, and desktops. Your guests will have a flawless experience regardless of what they use.

faq.question: What features can be added to my invitation?
faq.answer: We can include RSVP forms, countdown timers, location maps, photo galleries, music, video, gift registry links, Add to Calendar buttons, and much more, all customized to your event.

faq.question: Do you offer refunds?
faq.answer: Since each invitation is a bespoke, custom-built product, we do not offer refunds once design work has commenced. However, we work closely with you to ensure you are 100% happy with the final result.
